### Changed

- *(renovate)* Exempt Giant Swarm npm packages from 14-day minimumReleaseAge ([#1924](https://github.com/giantswarm/backstage/pull/1924)) [skip ci] in [#1924](https://github.com/giantswarm/backstage/pull/1924) by [@marians](https://github.com/marians)
- *(renovate)* Pin react below v19 until Backstage supports it ([#1928](https://github.com/giantswarm/backstage/pull/1928)) [skip ci] in [#1928](https://github.com/giantswarm/backstage/pull/1928) by [@marians](https://github.com/marians)

### Fixed

- *(deps)* Update ai-sdk packages in [#1926](https://github.com/giantswarm/backstage/pull/1926) by [@renovate[bot]](https://github.com/renovate[bot])
